title: Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates:
Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates!
